name: Nothing Ear (1)
confidenceReason: AutoEq contains Nothing ear (1) measurements from RTINGS HMS II.3.
notes: First-generation Nothing in-ear. Slightly warm tuning with a broad presence peak. Keep treble boosts moderate as the driver can become sibilant above 8 kHz.
knownRisks: sibilance if bands 6-7 are heavily boosted
slightly warm stock tuning may mask vocal detail
